# MADAR

MADAR is a Saudi AI-powered sales agent platform that installs a 24/7 digital employee for businesses, handling WhatsApp and phone reception, appointment booking, lead follow-up, and sales conversion.

## Product

MADAR builds and deploys AI sales employees for Saudi businesses — starting with medical and dental clinics:

- AI WhatsApp receptionist: responds in under 12 seconds in Saudi Arabic dialect.
- Automated appointment booking: checks availability and confirms directly in the schedule.
- Patient and lead management: records, follow-up, and reminders.
- Voice AI assistant for phone calls.
- Dashboard: real-time overview, appointments, doctors, services, reports.
- WhatsApp Business API integration.
- 24/7 operation — no breaks, no sick days, no overtime.

## Commercial Position

MADAR is a full-service SaaS solution for Saudi clinics. Clients get a custom AI receptionist live within 3 weeks. Monthly subscription pricing. No long-term contracts.

## Packages

- البداية الذكية (Smart Start): AI WhatsApp receptionist, appointment scheduling, basic dashboard, team training, 1-month support.
- النمو الكامل (Full Growth): Everything in Smart Start plus AI voice calls, advanced analytics, patient recovery automation, priority support.

## Important Notes

- The platform is clinics-first: dental, orthopedic, ophthalmology, dermatology, pediatric, and general medical clinics.
- WhatsApp Business API activation requires Meta approval and a connected business number.
- The product is Arabic-first, designed for Saudi operators.
